case_title: LARRY S. PRIMEAU VS. CORPORATE EXECUTIVE LIMOSINE

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY PRIMEAU, LARRY S. AS TO DEFENDANT CORPORATE EXECUTIVE LIMOSINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRIMEAU, LARRY S. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORPORATE EXECUTIVE LIMOSINE $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $78.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,078.00, *THE COURT FINDS THE DAMAGES FOR PERSONAL INJURY, LAST EARNINGS, AND PAIN AND SUFFERING, REASONABLY ATTRIBUTABLE TO THE ACCIDENT, IN WHICH PLAINTIFF WAS NOT AT FAULT, TO BE $600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRIMEAU, LARRY S. AS TO DEFENDANT CORPORATE EXECUTIVE LIMOSINE

RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORPORATE EXECUTIVE LIMOSINE $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $78.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,078.00, *THE COURT FINDS THE DAMAGES FOR PERSONAL INJURY, LOST EARNINGS, AND PAIN AND SUFFERING REASONABLY ATTRIBUTED TO THE ACCIDENT IN WHICH PLAINTIFF WAS NOT AT FAULT TO BE $6000.00. (AMENDED JUDGMENT CORRECTS SPELLING ERRORS IN THE ORIGINAL JUDGMENT.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
